name: Anthropic Agent Skills
evidence: 160k stars, 18.9k forks — canonical official Anthropic skills repo

17+ SKILL.md files under skills/ covering creative & design (algorithmic-art, canvas-design, frontend-design, theme-factory), development & technical (mcp-builder, webapp-testing, skill-creator), enterprise (brand-guidelines, internal-comms), and document skills (docx, pdf, pptx, xlsx)
Also contains the Agent Skills spec and skill template
Widely referenced by VoltAgent/awesome-agent-skills and heilcheng/awesome-agent-skills as the foundational official source

license.evidence: Apache 2.0 for most skills per README; document skills (docx/pdf/pptx/xlsx) are source-available not open source, packaged as reference implementations

dedup_result: No duplicate — anthropics/skills not in current registry (microsoft, coderabbitai, mcollina, K-Dense-AI). Some skill themes overlap with existing catalog (e.g., skill-creator vs microsoft skill-creator, mcp-builder vs microsoft mcp-builder) but these are different implementations from different sources — will be flagged as variants in normalization.
activation_handoff: Activate as active — clear license (Apache-2.0), canonical official source, 160k stars, public, no credentials needed. Note: document skills are source-available not open-source, but the catalog can track them with appropriate license annotation.

name: Figma MCP Skills
evidence: 1.7k stars, 159 forks — official Figma MCP server guide and skills repo

skills/ directory contains 8+ SKILL.md files: figma-use, figma-code-connect, figma-create-new-file, figma-generate-design, figma-generate-library, figma-generate-diagram, figma-use-figjam, figma-use-slides
Also includes figma-swiftui skill for iOS platform
These skills are the official implementation for the native Figma MCP server, referenced by thousands of developers

license.evidence: Repo governed by Figma Developer Terms (https://www.figma.com/legal/developer-terms/). Skills are explicitly downloadable and usable by any agentic tool (Claude Code, Codex, Cursor, Gemini CLI). Skills are a free Beta feature. No standard OSS license file in root, but skills have permissive public reuse posture — downloadable ZIP, installable via plugin, explicitly designed for public agent use.

dedup_result: No duplicate. New domain (design/Figma) entirely uncovered by current catalog. No overlap with any existing records.
activation_handoff: Activate as preview — public, official, downloadable, no credentials needed. License is Figma Developer Terms (not standard OSS), but terms explicitly permit use of skills by agents. Preview status appropriate given non-standard license and niche domain. Skills are canonical for the Figma MCP ecosystem.

name: Skills for Figma (Southleft)
evidence: 9 stars, MIT license, community-built open-source collection

18+ SKILL.md files spanning: tokens & variables (export/import/setup/manage/library-variables), components (analyze-component-set, arrange-component-set, component-properties, deep-component, generate-component-doc, design-system-inventory), quality & accessibility (lint-design, audit-accessibility, scan-code-accessibility, check-design-parity), annotations & FigJam & slides (annotations, create-figjam-content, build-slides)
All skills run through Figma MCP use_figma tool — no plan-gated APIs
Referenced in VoltAgent/awesome-agent-skills as a Figma skills source

license.evidence: LICENSE file in repo root confirms MIT

dedup_result: No duplicate in registry. Complements (does not duplicate) figma/mcp-server-guide — southleft skills are community extensions building on top of Figma's official skills with deeper design-system workflows.
activation_handoff: Activate as preview — small community source, MIT license, clear SKILL.md structure, public, no credentials. Covers design-system depth beyond official Figma skills. Preview appropriate given small star count and community status.

name: Frontend Designer Skill
evidence: 0 stars, Apache 2.0 — single comprehensive skill for frontend visual architecture
1 SKILL.md (v3.0 compact runtime contract with references/) plus v1.0 and v1.0-lite historical versions

Covers: CSS @layer cascade layers, OKLCH design tokens (3-tier: primitive→semantic→component), container queries, WCAG 2.2 + EAA 2025 accessibility, scroll-driven animations, bento grids, dark-mode-first, design.md handoff pattern
Research-validated claims cross-referenced against W3C specs, MDN, Evil Martians, Can I Use
Framework-agnostic, works with any CSS pipeline

license.evidence: LICENSE file in repo root confirms Apache License 2.0

dedup_result: No duplicate. Frontend CSS architecture domain is entirely uncovered by current catalog. Single SKILL.md but comprehensive reference-quality content.
activation_handoff: Activate as preview — single-skill repo, Apache 2.0, 0 stars (new/niche). Content quality is high (validated research, structured decision trees, anti-pattern blocks). Preview appropriate for small source.
